sentences.translation: Majka je uzela abdest prije podne-namaza.
sentences.translationEn: The mother performed ablution before the Dhuhr prayer.

sentences.translation: Pažljivo je oprala ruke, lice i noge.
sentences.translationEn: She carefully washed her hands, face, and feet.

sentences.arabic: صَلَّتْ أَرْبَعَ رَكَعَاتٍ فِي هُدُوءٍ وَخُشُوعٍ.
sentences.translation: Klanjala je četiri rekjata smireno i ponizno.
sentences.translationEn: She prayed four units in calmness and humility.

sentences.arabic: دَعَتِ اللَّهَ بَعْدَ الصَّلَاةِ بِقَلْبٍ صَادِقٍ.
sentences.translation: Nakon namaza dovila je Allahu iskrenim srcem.
sentences.translationEn: She supplicated to God after the prayer with a sincere heart.
